sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78862" key="para/surma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρά-συρμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n78862.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">excoriation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.14</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
